- 2026-03-15 [PSZ Main Web/Blood Bank Backend + Main Admin Panel]: Replaced main-site admin redirect with a native `/admin` module on the main app by removing `src/app/admin/[[...slug]]/route.ts` and adding authenticated admin login + management routes (`src/app/admin/page.tsx`, `src/app/admin/login/page.tsx`, `src/app/api/admin/{login,logout,blood-requests}/...`) using cookie-signed sessions in `src/lib/main-admin-auth.ts` with the same fallback credentials as store auth (`abdullahtanseer@gmail.com` / `CommonWe@lth!`). Implemented Blood Bank backend on the same database via `pg` (`src/lib/db.ts`) and `src/lib/blood-bank.ts` with persistent status workflow (`pending`, `in_progress`, `completed`, `cancelled`), public intake endpoint `src/app/api/blood-requests/route.ts`, public request page `src/app/blood-bank/page.tsx`, and homepage/navbar emergency visibility updates in `src/features/home/components/HomeClient.tsx`, `src/components/header/Navbar.tsx`, and `src/config/site.ts` including emergency contacts (Umar Hafeez, Ahmed Amir). Added schema tracker entries for `blood_bank_requests` in `docs/database/supabase_schema_tracker.md` and verified with successful root production build. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-15 [Paksarzameen Store/Sub-option Required + Select Value Simplification]: Added per-sub-option required control in admin customization editor by extending sub-option data with `required` (`store/src/lib/{validations,customizations}.ts`, `store/src/components/admin/CategoryForm.tsx`) and wired storefront required validation to honor sub-option-level mandatory selections in `store/src/components/storefront/CategoryCustomizationPanel.tsx` and `store/src/app/products/[slug]/AddToCartButton.tsx`. Also removed manual `Value` text input from select-value rows in admin; value keys are now derived from label via `slugify` during save to reduce redundant input. Verified with successful `store` production build. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-15 [Paksarzameen Store/Customization Image Field Type]: Added `image` as a supported customization field type across validation and parsing (`store/src/lib/{validations,customizations}.ts`), exposed it in admin sub-option type selector in `store/src/components/admin/CategoryForm.tsx`, and implemented customer image upload handling for image-typed groups in both `store/src/components/storefront/CategoryCustomizationPanel.tsx` and `store/src/app/products/[slug]/AddToCartButton.tsx` using `/api/upload` with preview/remove controls. Verified with successful `store` production build. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-15 [Paksarzameen Store/Sub-option Value Type Selectors]: Added per-sub-option field type configuration (`select`, `text`, `textarea`, `number`) in admin customization editor `store/src/components/admin/CategoryForm.tsx` so admins can choose how each sub-option captures values. Extended validation and parsing layers (`store/src/lib/validations.ts`, `store/src/lib/customizations.ts`) to persist and read group-level metadata (`fieldType`, `placeholder`, `min`, `max`). Updated storefront customization renderers in `store/src/components/storefront/CategoryCustomizationPanel.tsx` and `store/src/app/products/[slug]/AddToCartButton.tsx` to render each group according to its configured type while preserving select-value price adjustments. Verified with successful `store` production build. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-15 [Paksarzameen Store/Admin Customization Suboptions-First UX]: Updated `store/src/components/admin/CategoryForm.tsx` so category customization setup no longer asks admins to choose a field type per option; options now directly collect sub-options/values, and saved payloads are normalized to `fieldType: "select"` with grouped sub-options for consistency. Also updated helper copy and new-option defaults to immediately start with sub-option input flow. Verified with successful `store` production build. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-15 [Paksarzameen Store/Fallback Palette + Customization Visibility Pass]: Removed bright fallback artifact risk by retuning skeleton shimmer colors to brand-safe warm neutrals in `store/src/components/ui/skeleton.tsx` and strengthening card media fallback behavior in `store/src/components/storefront/ProductCard.tsx` (normalized image paths plus guaranteed themed background fallback). Tightened navbar customization dropdown source to only show categories that are both customizable and have at least one customization option by extending `/api/categories` counts and filtering in `store/src/components/storefront/Navbar.tsx`. Increased customization UI prominence in `store/src/components/storefront/CategoryCustomizationPanel.tsx` with larger option cards, larger selectable value tiles, larger input controls, and elevated summary card styling for better readability. Verified with successful `store` production build. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-15 [Paksarzameen Store/Image Fallback + Two-Step Category Customization UX]: Improved storefront product media resilience by normalizing non-root image paths and adding a guaranteed local background fallback in `store/src/components/storefront/ProductCard.tsx` so cards remain visually populated even when primary image URLs fail. Refactored category-level customization flow in `store/src/components/storefront/CategoryCustomizationPanel.tsx` into a two-step experience: Step 1 shows all available options; selecting one opens Step 2 (query-param-driven `?option=` state) to configure that option's suboptions/values or field input, with back navigation to the options list and retained summary/proceed logic. Updated category page typing to accept `option` search param in `store/src/app/categories/[slug]/page.tsx`. Verified with successful `store` production build. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-15 [Paksarzameen Store/Navbar Customizations Dropdown]: Updated `store/src/components/storefront/Navbar.tsx` so `Customizations` no longer routes directly by default on desktop/mobile; it now opens a dynamic dropdown/expand list of currently customizable categories loaded from `/api/categories` and linked to `/categories/[slug]`, with `View All` still available to access `/customizations`. Includes desktop hover+click menu behavior and mobile collapsible sub-menu behavior. Verified with successful `store` production build. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-15 [Paksarzameen Store/Flexible Customization Field Types]: Expanded category customization architecture to support admin-defined required/optional field types (`select`, `text`, `textarea`, `number`) without schema migration by storing field config in `CustomizationOption.options` JSON. Updated parser and storefront rendering in `store/src/lib/customizations.ts`, `store/src/app/products/[slug]/AddToCartButton.tsx`, and `store/src/components/storefront/CategoryCustomizationPanel.tsx` to enforce required rules per field type and capture freeform values in cart/checkout payloads. Upgraded admin customization builder in `store/src/components/admin/CategoryForm.tsx` with field type selector, required toggle, placeholders, number min/max controls, and conditional select-value editors. Extended validation compatibility in `store/src/lib/validations.ts`. Verified via successful clean `store` production build after clearing stale `.next`. (COPILOT_LOG)

Verified with successful `store` production build. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-15 [Paksarzameen Store/Storefront Visual Redesign]: Reworked core storefront presentation to a premium cosmetics-inspired system while preserving existing commerce behavior by introducing new global design tokens/utility classes in `store/src/app/globals.css` (cream/rose/green palette, Cormorant + Manrope typography, reusable section/button/card primitives), redesigning shared storefront components (`store/src/components/storefront/{Navbar,HeroSection,ProductCard,CategoryCard,ArtistCard,Footer}.tsx`), and updating page-level composition on home/products/cart/product-detail (`store/src/app/{page.tsx,products/page.tsx,cart/page.tsx,products/[slug]/page.tsx}`) for responsive spacing, hierarchy, and component consistency. - 2026-03-07 [PSZ Main Web/Performance]: Major performance & clean-code pass ÔÇö (1) Created `LazyVideo` component (`src/components/ui/LazyVideo.tsx`) with IntersectionObserver-based lazy loading and auto-pause for off-screen videos; (2) Replaced all non-hero `<video>` elements with `LazyVideo` to defer ~103 MB of video downloads; (3) Switched all `<img>` tags to `next/image` with AVIF/WebP format support, quality caps, and proper `sizes` hints for approach grid, showcase, impact hero, heart members (~54 MB of PNGs), program placeholders, and testimonial avatars; (4) Removed redundant Google Fonts CSS `@import` (already loaded via `next/font/google`); (5) Removed artificial 500 ms delays from all three service functions (`getArticles`, `getPrograms`, `getImpactStats`); (6) Updated `next.config.ts` with image optimization config (AVIF/WebP, remote patterns for Pexels/Unsplash, 30-day cache TTL), compression, and static asset cache headers; (7) Downscaled external Pexels video URLs from UHD 2560├Ś1440 to 720p; (8) Added CSS `contain: layout style paint` on `[data-scroll-section]` and `content-visibility: auto` on `.dark-bottom` for rendering performance; (9) Extracted inline data arrays (HEART_MEMBERS, SCROLL_TEXT_BLOCKS, PROGRAM_CARDS, TESTIMONIAL_AVATARS) from 1353-line `HomeClient.tsx` into `home.content.ts` reducing component to ~1220 lines; (10) Fixed `info.mp4` Ôćĺ `Info.mp4` filename casing bug that would 404 on Linux/Vercel. Build passes cleanly with zero errors or warnings. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-07 [Paksarzameen Store/Marketplace UI]: Implemented complete Paksarzameen Store Marketplace UI with dummy data for presentation ÔÇö (1) Created `Product` model (`src/lib/models/Product.ts`) with `Product` interface, `CartItem` interface, `ProductCategory` type, and `PRODUCT_CATEGORIES` array; (2) Added 16 dummy products across 4 categories (Traditional Clothing, Handicrafts, Cultural Goods, PSZ Merchandise) in `src/data/products.ts` with Unsplash placeholder images; (3) Built product service layer (`src/lib/services/getProducts.ts`) with `getProducts`, `getProductBySlug`, `getFeaturedProducts`; (4) Created `CartContext` (`src/features/commonwealth-lab/context/CartContext.tsx`) with React Context API for client-side cart state (add/remove/update/clear, computed totals); (5) Built 9 reusable components: `ProductCard`, `ProductGrid`, `ProductGallery`, `CategoryFilter`, `QuantitySelector`, `CartItem`, `CartSummary`, `MarketplaceHero`, `ProductDetailClient`; (6) Implemented 5 page routes under `/commonwealth-lab/`: landing page (hero, featured products, category grid, CTA), product listing (search, category filter, sort, pagination with Suspense boundary), product detail with `generateStaticParams`/`generateMetadata`, cart page, checkout page with form and payment selector; (7) Integrated "Paksarzameen Store" nav link into `site.ts` and updated `Navbar.tsx` slice range; (8) Luxury/premium design with gold (#C4A265) accents, elegant typography, hover animations, and responsive layouts; (9) All product images use `next/image` with proper sizing; (10) Also resolved merge conflict markers across 9 files from prior rebase (home.content.ts, HomeClient.tsx, getArticles.ts, getPrograms.ts, getImpactStats.ts, next.config.ts, globals.css, context.instructions.md, package-lock.json). Build passes cleanly with 36 static pages generated. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-07 [PSZ Main Web/Media Optimization]: Comprehensive image and video performance optimization ÔÇö (1) Created `scripts/optimize-images.mjs` using sharp to batch-compress all 23 local PNG/JPEG images to WebP at multiple responsive sizes (sm 480px, md 960px, lg 1440px, xl 1920px, full), achieving 94.3% reduction (82.46 MB Ôćĺ 4.66 MB); output at `public/images/optimized/` with manifest.json containing paths and blur placeholder base64 data URIs; (2) Created `scripts/generate-video-posters.mjs` to generate dark-gradient WebP poster placeholders for all 4 local MP4 videos, output at `public/videos/posters/`; (3) Enhanced `LazyVideo` component with `poster` prop for instant visual before video loads, `webmSrc` prop for dual MP4+WebM source support, and state-based `<source>` element injection so video data is never downloaded until IntersectionObserver triggers; (4) Created `src/lib/utils/media-helpers.ts` with `getBlurDataURL()`, `getOptimizedImagePath()`, `getOptimizedSizes()`, and `VIDEO_POSTERS` exports for centralized media optimization access; (5) Added `placeholder="blur"` + `blurDataURL` to all member images (├Ś8), approach grid images (├Ś7), founder image, and showcase image in HomeClient.tsx ÔÇö eliminates CLS and shows instant low-quality preview; (6) Added `poster` attribute to hero `<video>` and all 4 `LazyVideo` instances so users see a frame immediately instead of blank space; (7) Switched footer CSS `background-image` from 18.17 MB `footer.png` to 0.14 MB `footer.webp` (99.2% savings); (8) Extended `next.config.ts` headers with security headers (X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, X-XSS-Protection, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy), font caching, video poster caching, and Accept-based Vary header for optimized images; (9) Updated `vercel.json` with CDN caching rules for `/images/optimized/`, `/videos/`, `/videos/posters/`, and `/_next/static/`; (10) Added npm scripts: `optimize:images`, `optimize:posters`, `optimize:all`, and wired `prebuild` to auto-run optimization before `next build`. Build passes cleanly ÔÇö 36 static pages, zero errors/warnings. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-07 [PSZ Main Web/Mobile Responsiveness]: Comprehensive mobile responsiveness fixes across entire site ÔÇö (1) Fixed horizontal overflow by changing all `100vw` sections to `width: 100%; max-width: 100%` with `overflow-x: hidden` on mobile, expanded covered sections to include split, highlight, overlay-reveal, final-cta, scroll-text-block, impact-text/image; (2) Marketplace 2-column mobile grid: changed `ProductGrid.tsx` from `grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2` to `grid-cols-2` with tighter gap (`gap-x-3 gap-y-6`), updated Paksarzameen Store landing page featured products and category grids to also use `grid-cols-2` at all sizes; (3) Made `ProductCard` compact on mobile with smaller text (`text-xs`), reduced padding (`px-2 pt-3 pb-4`), shorter aspect ratio (`aspect-[3/4]` vs `aspect-[4/5]`), and correct `sizes="50vw"` hint for 2-col layout; (4) Fixed hero text positioning: shifted `.hero-content` up via `top: 45%` at 768px, `top: 42%` at 480px, `top: 40%` at 375px to prevent text appearing too low on mobile; (5) Reduced stack-card (programs section) sizing on mobile: `min-height: 38rem` Ôćĺ `34rem` Ôćĺ `30rem` across 768px/480px/375px breakpoints, illustration panel height `11rem` Ôćĺ `9rem` Ôćĺ `8rem`, content padding tightened, added smaller font sizes for card description/subtitle; (6) Fixed navbar mobile padding from `6rem 5% 3rem` Ôćĺ `2.4rem 5% 1.6rem` to prevent excessive top space; (7) Fixed `MarketplaceHero` from `w-screen` to `w-full` preventing horizontal overflow; (8) Added mobile-appropriate padding to Paksarzameen Store sections (`py-16 sm:py-28`, `px-4 sm:px-6`); (9) Added `padding-inline: 5%` to pinned-video section text on mobile for edge safety. Build passes cleanly ÔÇö 36 static pages, zero errors. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-07 [PSZ Main Web/Scroll Speed & Chapters]: (1) Sped up all GSAP ScrollTrigger scroll-pinned sections ÔÇö heart section end `total*100%` Ôćĺ `total*55%` and scrub `0.5` Ôćĺ `0.35`; programs section end `cards.length*130%` Ôćĺ `cards.length*80%` and scrub `0.45` Ôćĺ `0.35`; pinned videos end `"bottom top"` Ôćĺ `"70% top"`; canvas section end `"600% top"` Ôćĺ `"350% top"`; (2) Reduced Lenis smooth scroll duration from `1.2` Ôćĺ `0.85` for snappier page feel; (3) Tightened card animation timings ÔÇö enter `1.6s` Ôćĺ `1.2s`, dot activation `0.4/0.7` Ôćĺ `0.3/0.5`, hold `1.1s` Ôćĺ `0.6s`, push-back `1.1s` Ôćĺ `0.8s`; (4) Removed "Our Impact" header section and image section, replacing them with new "Our Chapters" section (`chapters-section`) showcasing 5 PSZ city chapters: Islamabad (Faisal Mosque SVG, green accent), Bahawalpur (Noor Mahal SVG, gold accent), Hyderabad (Pakka Qila SVG, blue accent), Lahore (Minar-e-Pakistan SVG, red accent), Multan (Shah Rukn-e-Alam SVG, purple accent); (5) Added `Chapter` type and `PSZ_CHAPTERS` data array to `home.content.ts`; (6) Chapters section features animated globe SVG with pulsing pin dots, glassmorphic city cards with landmark SVG icons, accent colour bars, hover glow effects, and index watermarks; (7) Added ~200 lines of chapters CSS with responsive 5Ôćĺ3Ôćĺ2 column grid, `globe-spin` keyframe animation, card hover transforms, and `[data-theme="light"]` overrides; (8) Cleaned up unused `IMAGES.impactHero` reference; (9) Added `.chapters-section` to theme transition smoothing and mobile overflow prevention lists. Build passes ÔÇö 36 static pages, zero errors. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-09 [PSZ Main Web/Admin Routing]: Fixed admin access mismatch between main site and separate store app by adding `src/app/admin/[[...slug]]/route.ts` redirect logic to forward `/admin` and nested admin paths to `siteConfig.commonwealthUrl/admin...`; updated `Navbar` Paksarzameen Store button to open the configured external store URL in a new tab (`target="_blank"`, `rel="noopener noreferrer"`) so users land in the correct app instead of a main-site 404. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-09 [PSZ Main Web/Paksarzameen Store URL Defaults]: Updated `src/config/site.ts` to use environment-aware `commonwealthUrl` fallback (`http://localhost:3001` in development, `https://store.paksarzameenwfo.com` in production) so admin redirects and bridge links remain valid even when `NEXT_PUBLIC_COMMONWEALTH_URL` is not set. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-09 [Paksarzameen Store/Admin Credentials]: Updated store admin defaults to requested login (`admin@gmail.com` / `admin123`) in `store/prisma/seed.ts`, `store/.env.example`, and `store/.env.local`; database reseed attempt was blocked because `DATABASE_URL` is not yet configured in local env. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-09 [Paksarzameen Store/Auth Login Fix]: Resolved repeated `401` invalid credentials path by normalizing credential email input (`trim().toLowerCase()`) in `store/src/lib/auth.ts` before Prisma lookup, and making `store/prisma/seed.ts` deterministically `upsert` the admin account with an updated hashed password on every seed run so requested credentials remain valid after reseeding. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-10 [Paksarzameen Store/Production Auth Env Hardening]: Fixed deployed admin sign-in server errors by centralizing auth env resolution in `store/src/lib/auth-env.ts`, explicitly feeding the resolved secret into both `next-auth` and `getToken` middleware, adding `AUTH_SECRET`/`AUTH_URL` fallback support, routing NextAuth errors back to `/admin/login`, and preserving `callbackUrl` on credential sign-in so production redirects remain stable behind Vercel/custom-domain setups. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-10 [Paksarzameen Store/Login Error Messaging]: Updated `store/src/app/admin/login/page.tsx` to detect `error=Configuration` from NextAuth and show a deployment-focused message on the login form so production auth misconfiguration is distinguishable from invalid credentials. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-10 [Paksarzameen Store/Hardcoded Auth Fallback]: Removed store auth dependence on deployment-only auth env vars by adding a code-level default secret in `store/src/lib/auth-env.ts`, introduced hardcoded admin credential fallback (`admin@gmail.com` / `admin123`) in `store/src/lib/auth.ts` ahead of Prisma lookup, and updated the admin login UI copy in `store/src/app/admin/login/page.tsx` to surface the default access path instead of env-specific remediation. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-10 [Paksarzameen Store/Admin Credential Alignment]: Updated the hardcoded auth fallback in `store/src/lib/auth-env.ts`, the admin login hint in `store/src/app/admin/login/page.tsx`, and seed defaults in `store/prisma/seed.ts` to use `abdullahtanseer@gmail.com` / `CommonWe@lth!` so runtime fallback and future reseeds stay aligned. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-10 [Paksarzameen Store/Upload Fallback Hardening]: Fixed admin image upload failures by adding code-level Cloudinary fallback configuration in `store/src/lib/cloudinary.ts`, wrapping `store/src/app/api/upload/route.ts` in structured error handling so server failures return JSON instead of opaque 500s, and simplifying `store/src/components/admin/ImageUploader.tsx` to surface the actual API error returned by the server. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-11 [Paksarzameen Store/Product Availability UI]: Replaced editable product stock counts with a boolean availability flow across `store/src/lib/validations.ts`, `store/src/components/admin/ProductForm.tsx`, API routes, store actions, admin listings, dashboard, analytics, and storefront purchase UI; availability now maps to the existing `stock` column internally (`1` for available, `0` for sold out) to avoid a breaking database migration while still rendering sold-out behavior consistently. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-11 [Paksarzameen Store/Billing + Stripe Checkout]: Replaced the cart WhatsApp completion path with a proper billing flow by adding `/checkout`, Stripe session creation at `store/src/app/api/checkout/session/route.ts`, hardcoded coupon support in `store/src/lib/coupons.ts`, pricing helpers in `store/src/lib/checkout.ts`, success/cancel return pages, Stripe env documentation in `store/.env.example`, and implementation notes in `docs/store/stripe_checkout_impl.md`. Payments are restricted to card-only Stripe Checkout sessions for advance payment. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-11 [Paksarzameen Store/Regional Pricing]: Added automatic market detection for Pakistan, the United States, and the United Kingdom by introducing request/cookie-based region helpers in `store/src/lib/pricing.ts` and `store/src/lib/pricing-server.ts`, setting a persistent `psz-region` cookie in `store/src/middleware.ts`, converting storefront/cart/checkout display pricing to regional currencies, and creating Stripe Checkout sessions in the detected market currency while keeping PKR as the catalog source of truth. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-11 [Paksarzameen Store/Admin-Managed Region Pricing]: Replaced hardcoded region availability with persisted `StoreRegion` and `ProductRegionPrice` models in `store/prisma/schema.prisma`, added admin region activation/default controls in `store/src/app/admin/settings/page.tsx`, required product forms/APIs to capture prices for every active non-default region, and updated storefront/cart/checkout pricing to use explicit saved regional product prices instead of exchange-rate conversion. Prisma client regeneration is required after pulling these schema changes, and the database needs `prisma db push` before the new tables will exist. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-09 [Paksarzameen Store/Admin Runtime + UI Redesign]: Fixed Next.js runtime error caused by passing non-serializable `render` callbacks from server admin pages into client `AdminTable` by replacing table API with serializable column kinds (`text`, `badge`, `image`) and preformatted row data in `store/src/app/admin/{products,categories,artists,sales}/page.tsx`; redesigned shared storefront/admin visuals to align with PSZ + Paksarzameen Store aesthetic across `store/src/app/globals.css`, `store/src/components/storefront/{Navbar,Footer}.tsx`, `store/src/app/admin/layout.tsx`, `store/src/components/admin/{AdminSidebar,StatsCard,AdminTable}.tsx`, `store/src/app/admin/login/page.tsx`, and tuned `store/src/components/ui/button.tsx` variants for consistent premium styling. Type-check passes (`npx tsc --noEmit`, exit 0). (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-09 [Paksarzameen Store/Deployment Env Safety]: Removed tracked `store/.env` from git and expanded root `.gitignore` to exclude `.env`, `.env.*`, and `store/.env` so Vercel uses project-managed environment variables instead of repository secrets during build/runtime. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-09 [PSZ Main Web/Build Scope Isolation]: Fixed root Vercel build failure caused by the main Next.js app type-checking nested `store/` files (`store/prisma/seed.ts`) by excluding `store/**/*` in root `tsconfig.json` and constraining root Next ESLint build scope to `src` via `next.config.ts`. (COPILOT_LOG)
